description: A health informatics specialist at Mercy General Hospital needs to create a new user account on the NextGen Connect Integration Engine server (https://localhost:8443) for an integration monitoring analyst. Create a user account with the following details: Username: monitor_analyst, First Name: Sarah, Last Name: Chen, Email: sarah.chen@mercygeneral.org, Organization: Mercy General Hospital, Description: Integration monitoring analyst, and Password: M0nitor2024!Secure. Authenticate using admin/admin. If using the REST API, include the required header 'X-Requested-With: OpenAPI'.
